stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Funicular railways are inclined cable railways that carry passengers up and down steep slopes.
  • Many funiculars were built in the 19th and 20th centuries in mountainous cities around the world.
  • The Reisszug is a famous funicular in Salzburg, Austria.
  • It has operated since at least 1515 CE.
  • The Niterói funicular is a famous funicular in Valparaíso, Chile.
  • It has operated since 1883 CE.
stem: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the ages of the funiculars. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: Both the Reisszug and the Niterói funicular are famous funicular railways, the former in Salzburg and the latter in Valparaíso.
The Reisszug and the Niterói funicular are funicular railways, inclined cable railways that carry passengers up steep slopes.
The Reisszug and the Niterói funicular are examples of funiculars, which proliferated in mountainous cities in the 19th and 20th centuries.
The Reisszug has operated since at least 1515; likewise, the Niterói funicular has been running for well over a century.

rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The sentence emphasizes a similarity between the ages of the two funiculars, noting that both have been operating for a long time—the Reisszug since at least 1515 and the Niterói funicular for well over a century.

Choice A is incorrect. The sentence emphasizes that both locations are famous funiculars and notes that they are in different cities; it doesn’t emphasize a similarity in their ages. Choice B is incorrect. While the sentence emphasizes that both are funicular railways, it doesn’t emphasize a similarity in their ages. Choice C is incorrect. The sentence gives information about funiculars in general; it doesn’t emphasize a similarity in the ages of these two funiculars specifically.
